_comment: Curated Anti-nero contracts missing from the original xlsx export. Discovered by scanning Diavgeia (luminapi search over ΥΠΕΝ decisions citing ΑΔΑΜ) and verified per-contract against the KHMDHS open-data API on 2026-07-18. Relevance basis per entry: fund = fundingDetails.publicFundingRefNum on the KHMDHS record; title = phase named in the contract title; diavgeia = ADA of the decision that ties the lot to the 07.02.2022 ΥΠΕΝ-ΤΑΙΠΕΔ framework. The loader (khmdhs.antinero_loader) re-verifies each basis at load time and refuses entries that fail.

22SYMV010447493.notes: Execution contract under the 07.02.2022 ΥΠΕΝ-ΤΑΙΠΕΔ framework (Υποέργο 1: Εθνικό Σχέδιο Αναδάσωσης - Σχέδιο Προστασίας Δασών). Signed 2022-04-13, Τ ΚΑΙ Τ ΚΑΤΑΣΚΕΥΕΣ Α.Ε.

22SYMV010447496.notes: Signed 2022-04-13, Δ. ΚΑΦΕΤΖΗΣ ΚΑΙ ΣΙΑ Ο.Ε.

22SYMV010551364.notes: Signed 2022-05-06, Κ/Ξ ΛΙΑΧΤΙΔΑ ΑΤΕΒΕ. Superseded by modification 22SYMV010864301.

22SYMV010785854.notes: Signed 2022-06-17, ΟΡΚΑ Α.Τ.Ε. Option-exercise decision ΡΗΧΚ4653Π8-3ΕΛ names lot 5.Α of the 17.06.2022 batch.

22SYMV010795597.notes: Signed 2022-06-17, ΧΡΗΣΤΟΣ ΚΥΡΙΑΚΑΚΗΣ & ΣΙΑ ΕΕ. ΑΔΑΜ recovered from option-decision PDF 6ΛΡΞ4653Π8-2ΝΛ.

22SYMV010795606.notes: Signed 2022-06-17, Κ/Ξ ΑΝΑΠΤΥΞΙΑΚΗ ΠΡΑΣΙΝΟΥ - ΓΕΩΓΝΩΜΩΝ. ΑΔΑΜ recovered from option-decision PDF 6Κ0Ν4653Π8-ΜΕΝ.

22SYMV011332552.notes: Anti-nero II wave-1 execution contract, signed 2022-09-22; missing from the xlsx because the title lacks the literal word ANTINERO. Superseded by 22SYMV011512210.

22SYMV011470180.notes: Signed 2022-10-18, Κ/Ξ 3Κ ΤΕΧΝΙΚΗ. Original of the modification 23SYMV011953055 already in the DB.

25SYMV017458228.notes: Signed 2025-08-28, ΜΑΝΑΡΙΤΣΑΣ ΕΥΑΓΓΕΛΟΣ. Same fund code and window as the ANTINERO IV contracts in the DB.

26SYMV018988979.notes: ΥΛΟΤΟΜΙΕΣ ANTINERO IV ΔΧ ΘΕΣΣΑΛΟΝΙΚΗΣ. Modification of 25SYMV017471411 already in the DB.

26SYMV018725481.notes: ANTINERO 2026 phase (Diavgeia decisions call this cohort ΑΝΤΙΝΕΡΟ 2026). Signed 2026-03-26.

24SYMV014662280.notes: Discovered via Diavgeia payment decisions (payments_not_in_db_155.xlsx). The payment-order PDFs state ΤΙΤΛΟΣ ΕΡΓΟΥ «ΠΡΟΓΡΑΜΜΑ ΠΡΟΣΤΑΣΙΑΣ ΔΑΣΩΝ - ANTINERO III». Management studies; sibling of 24SYMV014662322 (antinero_iii).

24SYMV014916640.notes: Discovered via Diavgeia payment decisions (payments_not_in_db_155.xlsx). The payment-order PDFs state ΤΙΤΛΟΣ ΕΡΓΟΥ «ΠΡΟΓΡΑΜΜΑ ΠΡΟΣΤΑΣΙΑΣ ΔΑΣΩΝ - ANTINERO III». ΣΥΜΒΑΣΗ ΓΙΑ ΤΗΝ ΕΚΤΕΛΕΣΗ ΤΜΗΜΑΤΟΣ 3 ΕΡΓΟΥ.

26SYMV018599431.notes: Found via Diavgeia ΑΔΑΜ-subject sweep 2026-07-19. Same 2026 numbered-contract series as the payment-confirmed ANTINERO III batch; ΥΠΕΝ decision on σύμβαση 10/2026 (ΑΔΑΜ 26SYMV018661963) explicitly says «του προγράμματος ANTINERO III». ΔΧ ΑΙΓΑΛΕΩ-ΜΕΓΑΡΩΝ-ΠΕΙΡΑΙΑ-ΠΕΝΤΕΛΗΣ (Σύμβαση 3/2026)
